mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id AS userId, book_id AS bookId, quantity, stock, created_at as createdAt
SELECT id, user_id AS userId, book_id AS bookId, quantity, stock, created_at as createdAt FROM sales WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sales (user_id, book_id, quantity, stock,status, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{bookId}, #{quantity}, #{stock}, '未発送',CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.update: UPDATE sales SET status = '発送済' WHERE id = #{orderId}
mapper.select: SELECT b.name AS name, SUM(s.quantity) AS salesAmount, SUM(s.quantity * b.price) AS totalSales FROM sales s JOIN books b ON s.book_id = b.id GROUP BY b.name
mapper.update: UPDATE books SET stock = stock + #{quantity} WHERE id = #{bookId}
UPDATE sales SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{orderId}
